headline: Dollar Tree (DLTR) Stock After 27% Monthly Jump Are Valuation Models Too Cautious?
summary: For investors considering whether Dollar Tree at about US$114 a share still offers value, or if the easy gains have already been made, this article focuses on what the current price might imply. The stock has moved 4.8% over the past week and 27.3% over the last month, while the return so far this year is a decline of 10.7%. The 1-year return stands at 19.8%, with a decline of 16.3% over 3 years and a 13.6% gain over 5 years. Recent headlines around Dollar Tree have focused on its role in...
